summary: First iteration frontend-only E2E testing for Rafli Life Tracker (Next.js). Covered all 6 modules (Dashboard, Goals, Career, Finance, Skills, Weekly Review), Quick Add modal, Command Palette, Theme toggle, Notifications drawer, mobile responsive layout, and localStorage persistence. Core flows work as specified.

ui_bugs.issue: Detail drawer is missing editable Month and Year inputs. The review requirement explicitly says 'detail drawer editable dengan month+year, organisasi, deskripsi, skill terkait, evidence URL, status dan kontribusi'. Currently only organization, description, skills, evidenceUrl, status, and contribution are editable. Month/Year are only rendered read-only in the header (formatMonthYear).

action_items: Add editable Month (select 1-12) and Year (number input) fields to MilestoneDetail drawer at /app/frontend/src/app/career/page.js (before or alongside the Status/Kontribusi row).

Add data-testid="milestone-detail-drawer" to the drawer <motion.aside> and data-testid="close-milestone-detail" to the header X button in MilestoneDetail. This improves testability parity with goal-detail-drawer/close-goal-detail.
Add data-testid="notification-<id>" to each notification <li> in NotificationsDrawer.jsx to allow granular click-to-mark-read testing (review request asks 'Klik notifikasi menandai read').

Optional: expose data-testid="catat-sesi" or aria-label on practice-skill-<id> to align with the copy 'Catat sesi' used in the review request (current data-testid is practice-skill-<id> which works but is less discoverable).
critical_code_review_comments: page.js imports greetingForNow from '@/lib/format' but never uses it (dead import). Uses local greetingSalute() instead.

In Dashboard, once a commitment is toggled to done via list row, it's filtered out of the 'upcoming' list via commitments.filter(c => !c.done). This is functionally correct but means the 'line-through' visual state only appears momentarily; consider showing done items collapsed at the bottom instead of removing them entirely for better feedback UX.
MilestoneDetail drawer is missing data-testid on the aside root, breaking testability convention used elsewhere (goal-detail-drawer exists).
NotificationsDrawer.jsx doesn't attach data-testid to individual notification rows, making it hard to write regression tests for read-state toggling.
seed_data_creation: Created transient TEST_ prefixed data during Quick Add flow (transaction, weekly review highlight, one 222222 budget). Cleaned up at end of test run via localStorage filter (script executed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 pages load, sidebar nav works, Quick Add + Palette + Theme + Notifications + Mobile + Persistence verified. Focus remaining testing on: (1) Career milestone drawer once month/year fields are added, (2) notification-<id> click-to-mark-read once testids added, (3) edge cases in filter combinations on Goals/Career. Note commitment toggle appears not to line-through because the Dashboard upcoming list filters out done items — this is by design.
verified_flows: Dashboard: greeting ID, Today's Focus (SQL joins), Life Pulse (readiness 37, momentum 54, saving rate 36, spending score 59), North Star Data Analyst, Monthly Pulse (Rp 1.2 jt disimpan), Savings Ladder (6 milestones 10-100jt), Insight card.
Sidebar nav across /, /goals, /career, /finance, /skills, /review — URL & content update.
Goals: 15 seed goals present; filter 'Career' reduces to 3 cards; goal-detail-drawer opens & closes.
Career: Career journey hero, readiness 37/100, 8 milestones with types, filter pills present.

Finance: Rp 1.684.750 net savings, savings ring 9%, 4 scorecards (Income/Expense/Saving rate/Spending score), Cashflow bars 6 months, Spending donut by category, Budget form add works, Reminders (BPJS/Sedekah/Service/Review), Export CSV actually downloads rafli-transactions-YYYY-MM-DD.csv.
Skills: 8 skill cards (SQL, Data Analysis, Python, Business Acumen, Financial Literacy, Data Visualization, Storytelling, English), practice-skill (Catat sesi) buttons work.
Weekly Review: review-form + review-highlights + focus-1/2/3 + save-review-btn present, save persists highlight text.
Quick Add: modal opens/closes; transaction TEST_income_regression added, appears on /finance Recent activity, persists across page refresh (localStorage).
Command Palette: Ctrl+K opens with palette-input; typing 'Finance' + Enter navigates to /finance. palette-trigger button also opens palette.
Theme Toggle: html class toggles between light and dark (verified programmatically).
Notifications Drawer: opens showing BPJS/SQL/Spending seed notifications; closes via close-notifications.
Mobile 390x800: open-sidebar-btn visible, opens sidebar overlay with nav items.
test_credentials: N/A — single seeded user rafli-akbar; no login screen (as specified).
